Restriction: Not permitted in cosmetics sold in Canada. Prohibited.

Restriction: Not permitted in cosmetics. Permitted only in nail products up to 0.02% as polymerisation inhibitor.

Restriction: Maximum 0.5% in hair dyes. Prohibited in other cosmetic products. Warning label required.

Restriction: Not permitted in products for children under 3. Maximum 0.1% in other products except bath salts where higher levels are permitted.

Restriction: Not permitted in any cosmetic product in any concentration.
